sys_ui_page.html: var alertID = RP.getWindowProperties().get('alert_id'); var grEvnt = new GlideRecord('u_event_task'); grEvnt.addEncodedQuery('sys_idIN' + alertID); grEvnt.query(); grEvnt.next(); grEvnt.u_event_number.u_account.toString(); var alertID = RP.getWindowProperties().get('alert_id'); var grEvnt = new GlideRecord('u_event_task'); grEvnt.addEncodedQuery('sys_idIN' + alertID); grEvnt.query(); grEvnt.next(); grEvnt.u_operating_country.toString();
sys_ui_page.name: EQIX_Add_EventStorm_From_Alerts
